text: Expedite, Hasten, Hurry, __________ Fill the blank by choosing a word with a meaning similar to that of the words given above.

A day can only be cloudy or sunny. The probability of a day being cloudy is 0.5, independent of the condition on other days. What is the probability that in any given four days, there will be three cloudy days and one sunny day?

The values of Stock A and Stock B on a particular day are Rs. 50 and Rs. 80, respectively. An investor invests Rs. 100 in Stock A and Rs. 80 in Stock B. He sells all the stocks the next day when the value of Stock A is Rs. 55 and Stock B is Rs. 70. The profit made by the investor is Rs. ________
'When it is raining, peacocks dance.' Based only on this sentence, which one of the following options is necessarily true?

options.A: Peacocks dance only when it is raining.
options.B: When peacocks dance, it is raining.
options.C: When peacocks are not dancing, it is not raining.
options.D: When it is not raining, peacocks do not dance.

text: Water : P :: Food : Q. Choose the P and Q combination from the options below to form a meaningful analogy.
An unbiased six-faced dice whose faces are marked with numbers 1 through 6 is rolled twice. The probability that the sum of the two recorded numbers is a prime number is ________

For two different persons x and y, the predicate M(x,y) denotes that x knows y. Consider: 'There is a person who does not know anyone else, but that person is known by everyone else.' Which expression represents the above statement?

Set T represents various traversals over binary tree. Set S represents order of visiting nodes. I: Inorder, II: Preorder, III: Postorder. L: left subtree, node, right subtree. M: node, left subtree, right subtree. N: left subtree, right subtree, node. Which is the correct match from T to S?
Which one of the following statements is equivalent to: Turing machine M decides the language L ⊆ {0,1}* ?

options.A: Turing machine M halts on all input strings in {0,1}*
options.B: Turing machine M accepts all input strings in L
options.C: Turing machine M rejects all input strings in {0,1}* − L
options.D: Turing machine M accepts all input strings in L and rejects all input strings in {0,1}* − L

text: The probability density function f(x) of a random variable X is f(x) = (1/(3√(2π))) exp(-x²/18), x∈(-∞,∞). Which statement is correct about X?

options.A: X is an exponential random variable
options.B: X is a normal random variable
options.C: X is a Poisson random variable
options.D: X is a uniform random variable

text: Match: T (I: Logical schema, II: Physical schema, III: External schema) with S (L: Views, M: File organization and indexes, N: Relations).
Which one of the following options is NOT a property of Boolean Algebra? (+ is OR, . is AND, ′ is NOT)
In C runtime environment, which one of the following is stored in heap?

options.A: A static variable declared inside a function
options.B: An array of integers declared inside a function
options.C: A dynamically allocated array of integers created using malloc()

text: S1: In non-vectored interrupt mechanism, it usually takes more time to start the ISR compared to vectored interrupt. S2: In daisy-chain interrupt mechanism, the CPU polls all input devices individually to determine the interrupt source. Which is correct?

options.A: Both S1 and S2 are true
options.B: Both S1 and S2 are false
options.C: S1 is true and S2 is false
options.D: S1 is false and S2 is true

text: Consider three ANSI-C programs P1, P2, P3. P1: int a=5; int main(){ int a=7; } P2: int main(){ int a=5; int a=7; } P3: int main(){ int a=5; float a=7; } Which statement is true?

options.A: Only P1 will compile without any error
options.B: Only P2 will compile without any error
options.C: Only P3 will compile without any error
options.D: All three will compile without any error

text: Consider concurrent execution of two transactions T1 and T2 accessing data object A. For them to NOT conflict on A, which must be true?

options.A: Both T1 and T2 only read A
options.B: T1 reads A and T2 writes A
options.C: T1 writes A and T2 reads A
options.D: Both T1 and T2 write A

text: A file of 4 million bytes transferred between two hosts via three consecutive links of bandwidth 2 Mbps, 500 kbps, and 1 Mbps. All processing and propagation delays negligible. No background traffic. Total time (in seconds) to transfer the file? (1M=10⁶, 1k=10³)
Which one of the following protocols may need to broadcast some of its messages?
Which one of the following CPU scheduling algorithms CANNOT be preemptive?
Consider functions (n positive integer): n^(1/3), log(n), log(n!), 2^(log(n)). Which lists them in increasing order of asymptotic growth? (base 2 log)
Which can be recurrence relation(s) corresponding to an algorithm with time complexity Θ(n)?
Let R be a binary relation on {1,2,...,10} where (x,y)∈R if the product of x and y is a perfect square. Which properties are satisfied by R?
For real a, let I(a) = ∫_{-1}^{1} (3x² - ax + 1) dx. Which statement(s) is/are true?

options.A: The value of I(a) is independent of a
options.B: The value of I(a) can vary with a
options.C: There exists a such that I(a) is positive
options.D: There exists a such that I(a) is negative

text: Numbers represented using 4-bit two's complement. N1=1011, N2=1101, N3=1010, N4=1001. Which operation(s) result in arithmetic overflow?
Which of the following grammars is/are ambiguous?
Keys 5, 28, 19, 15, 26, 33, 12, 17, 10 inserted into hash table using h(k)=k mod 9. Collisions resolved by chaining. The length of the longest chain is ______. (answer in integer)
System of linear equations: ax + y = b, 16x + ay = 24. If a and b are chosen such that the system has multiple solutions, then the product a×b is ______. (answer in integer)

Array A = [10,7,8,19,41,35,25,31]. Merge sort to sort in increasing order. A merge operation on sorted L and R is 'void' if output is L followed by R. Number of void merge operations among 7 total merges is ______. (answer in integer)
If an IP network uses a subnet mask of 255.255.240.0, the maximum number of IP addresses that can be assigned to network interfaces is ______. (answer in integer)
The 32-bit IEEE 754 single precision representation of a number is 0xC2710000. The number in decimal is ______. (rounded off to two decimal places)

A lexical analyzer uses token definitions: letter→[A-Za-z], digit→[0-9], id→letter(letter|digit)*, number→digit+, ws→(blank|tab|newline)+. For the string 'x1 23 mm 78 y7 z zz 5 14 A8 H AaYcD', the number of tokens (excluding ws) is ______. (answer in integer)

Consider complete graph K_n (n>4). Multiple spanning trees can be constructed. Jaccard coefficient between any two sets = |intersection|/|union|. The lowest possible Jaccard coefficient between any two spanning trees of K_n is?
Let G be a weighted DAG with m edges and n vertices. Given G and source s, worst-case time complexity of the fastest algorithm to find shortest paths from s to all reachable vertices?
Array A of size n indices 1..n. Check: ∀i>j, (A[i+1]-A[i]) > (A[j+1]-A[j]). Worst-case time complexity of fastest algorithm?
Dynamic programming table T[i][j] for 0≤i,j≤n. T[0][k]=T[k][0]=1. T[i][j]=2T[i-1][j]+3T[i][j-1]. Two algorithms given. Which statement is true?

options.A: Both algorithms B1 and B2 are correct
options.B: B1 is correct, but B2 is incorrect
options.C: B2 is correct, but B1 is incorrect
options.D: Both B1 and B2 are incorrect

text: 4-variable Boolean function F(A,B,C,D)=Σm(0,1,2,3,8,9,10,11) with A=MSB, D=LSB. Minimal sum of products form? (+ is OR, . is AND, ′ is NOT)

Armstrong's Axioms: Reflexivity (if Y⊆X then X→Y), Augmentation (if X→Y then XZ→YZ), Transitivity (if X→Y and Y→Z then X→Z). To prove Union (if X→Y and X→Z then X→YZ), which combination of the three rules is both necessary and sufficient?
Transmission of data bits 110001011 over a link using CRC. Generator bit pattern is 1001. The remainder bit pattern appended is?

Processor with 16 GP registers, 2-byte instruction format. Variable-sized opcodes. M-type: 2 regs + 6-bit immediate. R-type: 3 regs. C-type: 1 reg + 6-bit offset. If 2 unique M-type and 7 unique R-type opcodes, maximum unique opcodes for C-type?
S1: A hash index must be a dense index. S2: A B+ tree index can be a sparse index. Which is correct?

options.A: Both S1 and S2 are true
options.B: Both S1 and S2 are false
options.C: S1 is true and S2 is false
options.D: S1 is false and S2 is true

text: Let Σ={a,b,c,d} and L={aⁱbʲcᵏdˡ | i,j,k,l≥0}. Which constraint ensures L is context-free?

Stack S and queue Q, initially empty. Elements 1,2,3,4,5 arrive in order, each assigned to S (push) or Q (enqueue). First empty S (pop all), then empty Q (dequeue all). Output is 4,3,1,2,5. Which assignment(s) are valid? (xS = assigned to stack, xQ = assigned to queue)

Disk size 16 GB, block size 2 KB, block numbers are 32-bit. Linked list approach to keep track of free blocks. Each block uses 4 bytes pointer to next block. Number of blocks required to hold the free disk block numbers is ______. (answer in integer, 1K=2¹⁰, 1G=2³⁰)

Contiguous allocation with variable partitioning. 8 holes: 20,4,25,18,7,9,15,12 KB. No adjacent holes. P1 (16 KB) and P2 (9 KB) arrive in order, allocated using best-fit. After allocation, number of holes of size less than 8 KB is ______. (answer in integer)

Non-pipelined unit at 1.6 GHz takes 5 cycles/instruction. Pipelined at 1.2 GHz with goal of 1 IPC. 30% of instructions encounter 2-cycle stall. Speed-up of pipelined over non-pipelined is ______. (rounded off to two decimal places, 1G=10⁹)

New TCP connection. Receiver advertised window = 48 KB, MSS = 2 KB, slow start threshold = 16 KB. No timeouts or duplicate ACKs. Number of rounds of transmission to reach congestion avoidance phase is ______. (answer in integer, 1K=2¹⁰)
Consider ANSI-C program: int *ptr, a, b, c; a=5; b=11; c=20; ptr=&a; *ptr=c; ptr=&c; a=*(&b); c=*ptr - a; printf("%d",c); Output is ______. (answer in integer)
The determinant of a 4×4 matrix A is 3. The value of the determinant of 2A is ______. (answer in integer)

An unbiased coin is tossed 6 times. E1: among 2nd, 4th, 6th tosses, at least two heads. E2: among 1st, 2nd, 3rd, 5th tosses, equal heads and tails. P(E1|E2) = ______. (rounded off to one decimal place)

Link-layer protocol between two hosts directly connected over lossless link of length 3000 km. Bandwidth = 10⁸ bps, propagation delay = 5 ns/m. Every data byte has unique sequence number. Minimum bits N for sequence number such that (i) no wrap-around before 60s, (ii) maximum utilization achieved. N = ______. (answer in integer)
